reason: The image depicts a migration across the Eurasian Steppe, consistent with the Hunnic expansion of the 4th century. The people are dressed in what appears to be coarse linen and animal furs. They are equipped with horses, spears and carts. The overall ambiance of the image is fitting. No obvious anachronisms or elements of fantasy are visible. The only reason why it isn't a 10 is the clothing looks too clean. They also look more like extras on a historical movie set as opposed to people who have lived on the steppes for decades.
